generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance OccupancyController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) controller for occupancy-based lighting adjustments in TwinLight project, embedded within physical building infrastructure and modeled directly in BIM to include sensor configurations and control logic for adaptive lighting systems"
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) actuator for HVAC system control within the Living Lab building, integrated via Eclipse Hono middleware for real-time adjustments to thermal conditions based on DT-generated control signals"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded lighting control actuator within physical building components, modeled in BIM to include bidirectional communication endpoints for real-time adjustments to lighting systems based on DT-generated policies"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled occupancy sensor deployed in building zones, mapped to BIM elements via middleware (Ditto) to provide real-time operational data on tenant occupancy for DT monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance LightIntensityMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring light intensity levels in building zones, configured via middleware (Ditto) to provide real-time data on ambient lighting conditions for DT visualization and control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightIntensityDataStream
]

instance EnvironmentalMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Comprehensive IoT environmental monitor (temperature, humidity) deployed across building components, mapped to BIM elements via model-driven transformations to provide runtime operational data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataStream
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption monitoring sensor integrated with building infrastructure, configured via middleware (Ditto) to track real-time power usage data for DT analytics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightIntensityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightIntensityMeter
]

instance EnvironmentalDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalMonitor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Original BIM model of the Living Lab building enriched with device configurations, sensor IDs, control logic, and tenant-specific metadata via model-driven transformations for DT runtime integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance RuntimeBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Transformed BIM model converted into runtime artifacts (Hono/Ditto configurations) through model-to-model and model-to-text mappings for seamless integration with physical infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualizationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D visualization data generated by Unreal Engine for immersive DT monitoring of building conditions (occupancy, lighting levels, environmental parameters)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightIntensityDataStream, OccupancyDataStream, EnvironmentalDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEnginePlatform
]

instance AdaptiveControlParameters : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Dynamic control parameters derived from reinforcement learning in BOREALIS project for adaptive lighting optimization, balancing energy efficiency and visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance PerformanceAnalyticsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics data generated from BIM data and runtime operational data for life-cycle optimization of building performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMEnrichedModel, EnergyConsumptionDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework automating the transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts (Hono/Ditto configurations) via model-to-model and model-to-text mappings to enable seamless DT-physical integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeBIMModel
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware platform (Eclipse Hono) facilitating real-time bidirectional data exchange between physical building assets and DT runtime interfaces for control system integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables OccupancyController, HVACController, LightingActuator
]

instance UnrealEnginePlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization environment (Unreal Engine 5) providing interactive 3D monitoring and simulation capabilities for DT building conditions"
    DTDFVocab:enables UnrealEngineVisualizationData
]

instance BIMStandards : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IFC-based BIM standards serving as semantic foundation for device modeling and interoperability between physical building components and DT representations"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMEnrichedModel
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dynamic control logic evolution platform (BOREALIS project) implementing reinforcement learning algorithms for adaptive lighting optimization and energy-efficient building management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlParameters
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performance analysis engine leveraging BIM data and runtime operational data for predictive analytics and life-cycle optimization of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables PerformanceAnalyticsData
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive visualization of building conditions (occupancy, lighting levels, environmental parameters) via Unreal Engine for real-time monitoring and stakeholder collaboration"
    DTDFVocab:provides UnrealEngineVisualizationData
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing adaptive lighting control using reinforcement learning (BOREALIS project) to optimize energy efficiency while maintaining visual comfort and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlParameters
]

instance SimulationAndAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing predictive analytics and performance analysis using BIM data and runtime operational data for life-cycle optimization of building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalyticsData
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data visualization and analysis for optimizing building resource allocation and energy consumption patterns"
]

instance LightingConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization of lighting levels and quality metrics for adaptive control optimization and visual comfort assessment"
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of environmental parameters (temperature, humidity) for HVAC system optimization and building comfort analysis"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics of energy consumption patterns for cost reduction and life-cycle optimization of building systems"
]

instance AdaptiveLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on occupancy data and reinforcement learning-derived control parameters for energy-efficient operation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustment of HVAC systems based on environmental monitoring data and DT-generated control signals for thermal comfort optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated predictive maintenance scheduling based on IoT sensor data and DT analytics for equipment health monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomAnalyticsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Domain-specific analytics processing via custom plugins for advanced building performance insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C17: Environment and Components
instance LivingLabBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancyController, HVACController, LightingActuator,
        OccupancySensor, LightIntensityMeter, EnvironmentalMonitor,
        EnergyConsumptionSensor, BIMEnrichedModel, RuntimeBIMModel
]

instance BuildingZoneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancySensor, LightIntensityMeter, EnvironmentalMonitor,
        OccupancyController, LightingActuator
]

instance ControlSystemComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized modular control system infrastructure for building automation, implemented via service-oriented architecture with standardized extension points"
]

instance BIMIntegrationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Semantic integration layer between BIM models and DT runtime artifacts, enabling automated metadata extraction and device configuration synchronization"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by DT services (e.g., adaptive lighting optimization via reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) are transmitted back to the physical building via middleware (e.g., **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**) to adjust actuators and controllers. This interaction is designed to be modular, allowing for dynamic updates without redeployment, and is grounded in BIM-based control logic definitions embedded during the model-driven deployment phase."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a real-time time scale, ensuring live synchronization between physical and virtual systems. The framework enables continuous data exchange with no specified fixed interval (e.g., 1-second), but rather supports adaptive synchronization based on operational demands. The emphasis is on real-time responsiveness for monitoring, control, and optimization tasks throughout the building life cycle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is a **service-oriented, modular ecosystem** centered around a BIM-based architecture. It integrates:
  1. **Physical assets** (sensors, actuators) via middleware (e.g., **Ditto/Hono**).
  2. **Runtime services** (e.g., adaptive lighting, analytics) deployed via standardized extension points.
  3. **Visualization layer** (Unreal Engine) for stakeholder interaction.
  The framework ensures interoperability across heterogeneous systems (e.g., BIM tools, IoT platforms) by leveraging MDE principles and BIM semantics, enabling seamless orchestration of components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the entire building life cycle, covering:
  1. **Design phase**: Enriched BIM models with device configurations and control logic (e.g., TwinLight project).
  2. **Construction phase**: Validation of BIM-to-DT transformations and integration with IoT sensors.
  3. **Operation phase**: Real-time monitoring, adaptive control (e.g., BOREALIS reinforcement learning), and service evolution via middleware (e.g., **Ditto/Hono**).
  The framework ensures compatibility with BIM standards (e.g., IFC) and supports post-occupancy adjustments for operational optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured through:
  1. **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE)**: A metric used to evaluate the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart in the Living Lab case study.
  2. **Automated validation**: Model-driven transformations validate BIM-to-DT mappings for consistency.
  3. **Runtime synchronization**: Low-latency middleware (e.g., **Ditto/Hono**) minimizes data drift between physical and virtual representations.
  Validity is supported by:
  - **BIM standards (IFC)** for semantic coherence.
  - **Model-driven governance**: Formal encoding of architectural decisions (e.g., control logic) into BIM models.
  - **Post-occupancy feedback loops** (e.g., BOREALIS reinforcement learning) to iteratively improve DT accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on middleware platforms Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, enabling bidirectional communication between physical assets and the DT. The system supports scalable, service-oriented architectures without specifying proprietary protocols (e.g., MQTT, RESTful APIs) or specific software tools (e.g., Autodesk Revit). The focus is on standardized integration frameworks to ensure interoperability across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a scalable, service-oriented platform without specifying cloud hosting (e.g., AWS, Azure) or on-premise servers. The framework emphasizes modularity and extensibility, enabling deployment across distributed infrastructures while maintaining consistency with BIM and MDE standards. The emphasis is on real-time synchronization and operational adaptability, supported by middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) and visualization tools (Unreal Engine)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with BIM tools (e.g., BIM standards like IFC) and IoT platforms for data exchange. The framework supports seamless collaboration between design-time BIM models and operational DTs, ensuring consistency across disciplines. External systems are integrated via standardized extension points, enabling modular service integration without proprietary software (e.g., Autodesk Revit, Siemens MindSphere)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are not explicitly addressed in the documents. The framework focuses on real-time data exchange via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) and BIM standards, but no specific mechanisms (e.g., RBAC, TLS, data encryption protocols) are mentioned for managing ownership or privacy rights."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to:
  1. **BIM standards (IFC)**: Semantic foundation for device modeling and interoperability.
  2. **Open middleware standards (Eclipse Hono/Ditto)**: Real-time data exchange protocols.
  3. **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)**: Formal methodologies for automated transformations.
  4. **AECO-specific extensions**: Domain-specific control logic (e.g., TwinLight lighting semantics) embedded in BIM models.
  The framework ensures compliance with **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE)** metrics for validation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are not explicitly addressed in the documents. The focus is on real-time data exchange, BIM integration, and operational optimization. No specific measures (e.g., TLS, firewalls, ISO 27001 compliance, human-in-the-loop oversight) are mentioned for ensuring cybersecurity or operational safety in remote DT-controlled environments."
]
